title: Caved Origins
description:
Based on the Minecraft Hardcore Series with SkyNexusHD and Kilim81.

This modpack adds a layer of excitement to the game, by excitement I mean bedrock. that's right in this modpack your trapped under ground with your only friend being that 1 glow berry!
body:
[![Code SNHD](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/af8ec773283513fdf7c952795f0d711ae8e5b6cf.jpeg)](https://www.voicemod.net/?refn=skynexushd&tracking_id=999d68a19a244ef5af11d60f1ef6384d&utm_campaign=6023bf347e9fb&utm_source=WHuVawz6)

**Caved Origins** is a Modpack Created by [SkyNexusHD](https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCkZFEE70-kXFP9hNdtKmjTQ) and [Kilim81](https://www.youtube.com/@kilim81) based on the Youtube Series Caved Origins you can watch the videos here (Notice: Might not be released before this)![Caved Origins Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2229dcab38c8bfbb185280d7532d65ca5852d2ce.png)            

This modpack adds a layer of excitement to the game. By excitement, I mean bedrock. That's right! In this modpack, you're trapped underground, with your only friend being that one glow berry! (If at all.)

This modpack features a wide range of mods, ranging from Better Cave Worlds to Origins, which adds more difficulty to the game. If you wish to see this modpack in action, visit our channels to watch it being played!

(Links will be provided along with the release of the first videos. More screenshots will be added as we update and expand the pack.)
